summary: intrinsic 검증단 — 도구(컴파일/테스트) 실행 금지, 읽고 추론만으로 판정 (H3 대조군: Huang ICLR24 intrinsic self-correction)

verdicts.desc: compute(20)이 정답 49가 아닌 다른 값을 반환하는 계산 버그가 있다(읽고 추론으로 판단; 실행 금지).

votes.reason: Hand-traced the loop i=1..20: divisible-by-3 terms (i*2) sum to 126, divisible-by-5-not-3 terms sum to 35, subtracted others sum to 112; 126+35-112 = 49. Step-by-step accumulation also lands on 49, matching the stated correct answer, so no runtime calculation bug exists.
